name: auth.refreshToken
description: Refresh an expired access token using a stored refresh token. Follows OAuth 2.0 refresh token grant (RFC 6749 §6). Returns new access token without requiring user interaction.

client_id.description: OAuth client identifier for which to refresh tokens. Defaults to guideai-mcp-client.

store_tokens.description: Whether to persist refreshed tokens in system keychain (or file fallback). Recommended true.

access_token.description: New OAuth access token issued by authorization server.

refresh_token.description: New refresh token (may be rotated by server, or same as before).

scopes.description: Scopes granted to the new access token.

expires_in.description: Validity period of new access token in seconds (typically 3600).

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when new access token expires.

refresh_expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when new refresh token expires.

token_storage_path.description: Location where refreshed tokens are stored (keychain service name or file path).

error.description: OAuth 2.0 error code if refresh failed (RFC 6749 §5.2).
